description.value:
A hybrid weapon combining a blade with a built-in firearm, allowing seamless transitions between melee and ranged combat.

TrainingPropertiesSpecial
BasicOne-Handed, Finesse, Melee d8, Ranged 2d6+5 (40/160), Reload (attack), FirearmHipshot, Steady

rmeData.masterPerk: When you take the Attack action on your turn, you can make one additional attack as part of your Attack action. If you made a ranged attack with this weapon, then this additional attack must be a melee attack. If you made a melee attack with this weapon, then this additional attack must be a ranged attack.
